general_info.definition: Graphene quantum dots (GQDs) as part of a Graphene quantum dots-polyaniline/zinc oxide nanocomposites (GQDs-PANI/ZnO-NCs) to construct an electrochemical sensor of anticancer drugs

method.conditions: A mixture of glucose (1.0g), ethylene diamine (400μL), and HCl (37%, w/w) (200μL) added to 15mL deionized water under stirring for 30min then heated at 200 °C for 6 h in an autoclave

post_treatment: Dialysis to remove large tracts of GO

applications.performance: Used as a modifier in GQDs-PANI/ZnO-NCs composite on a glassy carbon electrode (GCE) for simultaneous determination of Irinotecan (CPT-11) and 5-Fluorouracil (5-FU). Achieved linear ranges of 0.1-25.0 μM (CPT-11) and 0.1-50.0 μM (5-FU) with detection limits of 0.011 μM and 0.023 μM for CPT-11 and 5-FU, respectively.
applications.comparative_advantage: This sensor for the first time offered a facile technique for simultaneous determination of CPT-11 and 5-FU with a short analysis time coupled with excellent anti-interference ability, repeatability, reproducibility, long-term stability and cost-effectiveness..

feedback.label: Good
